test_cases.name: health_check_returns_ok
test_cases.description: Health check endpoint returns status ok

test_cases.name: create_author_with_all_fields
test_cases.description: Create author with name, bio, and born_year returns 201

test_cases.name: create_author_missing_name_validation_error
test_cases.description: Create author without required name field returns 422

test_cases.name: list_authors_with_pagination
test_cases.description: List authors with skip and limit parameters returns paginated results

test_cases.name: get_author_by_id_returns_etag
test_cases.description: Get author detail returns 200 with ETag header

test_cases.name: get_author_with_if_none_match_etag_match
test_cases.description: Get author with matching If-None-Match header returns 304 Not Modified

test_cases.name: get_nonexistent_author
test_cases.description: Get author with invalid ID returns 404 not found

test_cases.name: update_author_partial_fields
test_cases.description: Update author with partial fields returns 200 with updated data

test_cases.name: update_author_with_stale_etag
test_cases.description: Update author with mismatched If-Match header returns 412 Precondition Failed

test_cases.name: delete_author_with_associated_books
test_cases.description: Delete author with active books returns 409 Conflict

test_cases.name: create_category_with_unique_name
test_cases.description: Create category with unique name returns 201

test_cases.name: create_category_duplicate_name
test_cases.description: Create category with duplicate name returns 409 Conflict

test_cases.name: list_all_categories
test_cases.description: List all categories returns 200 with array of categories

test_cases.name: create_book_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Create book with all required fields returns 201

test_cases.name: create_book_duplicate_isbn
test_cases.description: Create book with duplicate ISBN returns 409 Conflict

test_cases.name: create_book_invalid_isbn_length
test_cases.description: Create book with ISBN outside 10-13 character range returns 422

test_cases.name: list_books_with_search_filter
test_cases.description: List books with search parameter filters by title and ISBN

test_cases.name: list_books_with_price_range_filter
test_cases.description: List books with min_price and max_price filters returns matching books

test_cases.name: get_soft_deleted_book_returns_gone
test_cases.description: Get soft-deleted book returns 410 Gone

test_cases.name: soft_delete_book_sets_is_deleted
test_cases.description: Delete book performs soft delete and returns 204

test_cases.name: restore_soft_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Restore soft-deleted book returns 200 with restored book data

test_cases.name: restore_non_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Restore non-deleted book returns 400 Bad Request

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_old_book
test_cases.description: Apply discount to book published more than 1 year ago returns 200

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_new_book
test_cases.description: Apply discount to book published within 1 year returns 400

test_cases.name: increase_book_stock
test_cases.description: Increase book stock with positive quantity returns 200

test_cases.name: decrease_stock_below_zero
test_cases.description: Decrease stock below zero returns 400 Insufficient stock

test_cases.name: upload_valid_png_cover
test_cases.description: Upload valid PNG cover returns 200 with upload details

test_cases.name: upload_unsupported_file_type
test_cases.description: Upload non-image file returns 415 Unsupported Media Type

test_cases.name: upload_oversized_cover
test_cases.description: Upload file larger than 2MB returns 413 Content Too Large

test_cases.name: create_review_with_valid_rating
test_cases.description: Create review with rating 1-5 returns 201
